title: Widen skeleton: `task list` and `task show`
description: Widen the read side of the skeleton by reusing the loader, schema, and index from task-skeleton-task-next. Add `waystation task list` and `waystation task show <id>` with stable, scriptable output.
acceptance: `waystation task list` lists tasks with their status.
`waystation task show <id>` shows one task, and errors cleanly on an unknown id.
No new storage or index layer is introduced — these commands reuse the core built in task-skeleton-task-next.
bun:test covers list output and show-by-id including the not-found case.
notes: Thin CLI wrappers over existing core logic (scope-cli rule). If a command needs new core behavior, that is a signal the previous slice was too thin.
